name: cogniva-skills
description: Cogniva's team toolkit: glossary and auto-doc skills, Module-architecture repo scaffolding (repo-init, add-module), a feature workflow (plan-feature, execute-feature, complete-feature, quick-fix) that runs tasks in isolated git worktrees and auto-merges into your checked-out branch, lightweight deferred-work capture (backlog), and read-only status roll-ups (feature-status, module-status, repo-status).
